name: quder-remote
description: Production-oriented AnyDesk-style remote desktop foundation with secure signaling and low-latency WebRTC sessions.

scripts.dev: npm --workspace @quder/protocol run build && npm-run-all --parallel dev:server dev:web
scripts.build: npm --workspace @quder/protocol run build && npm --workspace @quder/server run build && npm --workspace @quder/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @quder/protocol run build && npm --workspace @quder/server run typecheck && npm --workspace @quder/web run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @quder/protocol run lint && npm --workspace @quder/server run lint && npm --workspace @quder/web run lint
